sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Spaceship Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a battle cruiser spaceship in horizontal scrolling shooter format. No jump mechanics applicable as this is a shmup.

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Destroys enemy formations to gain power-up points. Power-ups include higher speed and faster rate of fire. Effects degrade over time and must be regained.

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: This is a shoot-em-up (shmup) game, not a platformer. Traditional jump physics, gravity, and character movement parameters are not applicable. Only spaceship movement mechanics documented qualitatively in Wikipedia. No specific physics values provided in source material.
